explore.when_to_use: Finding files and patterns, searching code, answering 'where is X?', discovering cross-module patterns, unfamiliar module structure
explore.when_not_to_use: Implementation work, writing files, complex analysis, single known-location lookups (use grep/glob directly)

librarian.key_trigger: External library/source mentioned → fire librarian background
librarian.when_to_use: Library docs, SDK research, finding OSS examples, best practices for unfamiliar packages
librarian.when_not_to_use: Internal codebase search (use explore), known APIs, trivial lookups

multimodal-looker.when_to_use: Image analysis, PDF extraction, diagram interpretation, screenshot review
multimodal-looker.when_not_to_use: Text-only files, code that can be read directly

sisyphus-junior.key_trigger: Specific implementation task with clear scope
sisyphus-junior.when_to_use: Bug fixes, feature additions, code changes, specific task execution

hephaestus.key_trigger: Build failure, type error, dependency issue
hephaestus.when_to_use: Build failures, type errors, toolchain issues, dependency problems

oracle.key_trigger: 2+ failed fix attempts, architecture decision, code review
oracle.when_to_use: Architecture decisions, after 2+ failed fixes, unfamiliar patterns, security/performance concerns, multi-system tradeoffs
oracle.when_not_to_use: Simple file ops, first attempt at any fix, questions answerable from code you've read, trivial decisions

prometheus.when_to_use: Strategic planning, requirement interviews, structured work plans
prometheus.when_not_to_use: Execution, simple tasks, research without planning need

metis.when_to_use: Pre-planning gap analysis, risk identification, hidden requirement detection

momus.when_to_use: Plan review, critique, catching gaps and ambiguities before execution

socrates.when_to_use: Deep research requiring iterative dialogue, complex questions, knowledge synthesis

sisyphus.when_to_use: Multi-agent coordination, complex workflows, parallel execution
sisyphus.when_not_to_use: Simple tasks, single-file edits, direct execution

atlas.when_to_use: Todo list execution, completing ALL tasks via delegation

triage.when_to_use: Pre-classifying ambiguous requests before routing to sisyphus or sisyphus-junior; stateless classifier only
triage.when_not_to_use: Implementation, research, planning, any task requiring tools beyond reading
